intro: Between April 13 and April 20, 2026, ZCyberNews published nine articles tracking CVEs. The vulnerabilities covered during this period were predominantly informational in nature, with eight such reports and a single high-severity flaw. These security issues impacted a range of sectors, with notable attention on critical infrastructure and technology. The reported vulnerabilities had a broad geographical footprint, affecting systems within the European Union and on a global scale. This collection provides a focused look at the specific software vulnerabilities disclosed and monitored within that week.
